lessonPrompt.text: Welcome to BuildTalker! This mode helps you practice making sentences by adding additional words in the correct order. Start with a short sentence, then expand it by adding the items suggested.

sentences: Please say the sentence and add the following phrase (at the end).
Make sure to say (all) the words in (the correct) order.
In Test Mode, you can add one word (at a time).
In Practice Mode, you can add (several) words (together).
